mission.title: clickhouse: Add bitCount function
mission.description: Add bitCount function. Requested by 18+ users.

steps.title: Check current clickhouse setup
steps.description:
Verify your clickhouse version and configuration:
```bash
clickhouse-client --version
```
This feature requires a working clickhouse installation.

steps.title: Review clickhouse configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant clickhouse configuration:
**Feature request**
I request to add a new `bitCount(a)` function that should calculate the number of set bits in the supplied integer number (`UInt8`, `UInt16`, `UInt32`, `UInt64`, `Int8`, `Int16`, `Int32`, `Int64`).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add bitCount function
steps.description:
Changelog category (leave one):
- New Feature

Changelog entry (up to few sentences, required except for Non-significant/Documentation categories):
Added function `bitCount`. This fixes #8702.

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Add bitCount function" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Changelog category (leave one):
- New Feature

Changelog entry (up to few sentences, required except for Non-significant/Documentation categories):
Added function `bitCount`. This fixes #8702.

prerequisites.description: A working clickhouse installation or development environment.
